original_behavior: Filtered-collapse robustness used explicit temperature exclusion logic (forcedRemoveTemps_K=34; highTempBoundary_K=30 with width_missing and peak-at-lowest-current rules), and temperature boundary audit flagged 4K and 30K as edge effects.
canonical_behavior: No explicit transition or boundary exclusion; Tgrid is all unique T_K from observables and only rows with >=5 finite current points are kept.

original_behavior: Stage1B recorded failure structure by temperature region (width failure mid_T; kappa failure low_T) for interpretation.
canonical_behavior: Single global robustness summary; no region-specific gating or reporting rule.

original_behavior: Stage1 canonical methods filtered to canonical-equivalent definitions only; non-equivalent methods were explicitly excluded (com, dsdi_peak, halfmax_mid, rms, iqr, asymmetric, local_avg, local_median, variant-specific x scaling).
canonical_behavior: Uses a full 4x4x3x3 sweep including the previously excluded non-equivalent methods and scaling modes (144 variants).

original_behavior: Stage1 locked source to run_2026_03_10_112659_alignment_audit switching_alignment_samples.csv with observable S_percent and fixed canonical collapse coordinate.
canonical_behavior: Hardcoded to the same historical run id, not to TRUSTED_CANONICAL run_2026_04_03_000147_switching_canonical, and no trust-class verification is performed.

original_behavior: Original stage definition required fixed collapse coordinate tied to canonical definitions.
canonical_behavior: scaleModes include fwhm,rms,asymmetric so collapse coordinate is variant-dependent instead of fixed canonical-only.

original_behavior: Stage1 and Stage1B used variant-vs-canonical metrics (corr_vs_canonical, rmse_abs, median_rel_dev, worst_rel_dev) plus forensic diagnostics (grid-cause ratios and kappa cases A-D).
canonical_behavior: Uses minimum pairwise correlation across all variants and collapse ratio range only; no Stage1B forensic decomposition metrics.

original_behavior: Measurement robustness artifacts used per-observable Pearson, Spearman, NRMSE, max relative deviation, and trend/sign consistency checks.
canonical_behavior: These measurement robustness criteria are not part of the canonical parameter robustness script outputs.
